question:
What is the most defensible reason to tip a server in a country where tipping is the norm?
A) It proves to the server that you are wealthier than they are.
B) It gives you the right to treat the server poorly during the meal.
C) It adheres to the social contract in a system where their base wage assumes tips.
D) It ensures the food will be cooked better next time.
